creator: guewal@aon.at
text:
Machine reboots unexpectedly.

In /var/log/messages following entry is saved:

Jul 29 14:24:19 LULA savecore[851]: reboot after panic: moea_pvo_to_pte: pvo 0x1f136640 has invalid pte 0x1dc5518 in moea_pteg_table but valid in pvo: 93960a97, 99bab281


OS specification ('uname -a'):

FreeBSD LULA 13.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE releng/13.1-n250148-fc952ac2212 GENERIC powerpc

HW specification:

Apple Mac mini G4, 1.5 Ghz, 1GB RAM

Kernel modules active ('kldstat'):

Id Refs Address        Size Name
 1    8   0x100180  110ee8c kernel
 2    1 0xdbc88000    24000 fdescfs.ko
 3    1 0xdbe00000    21000 mac_ntpd.ko
 4    1 0xdbe6e000    3d000 fusefs.ko
